title: org mutation JSON output
description: Schema for the JSON output of 'org update' and 'org archive' commands with '--format json'.

command.description: The mutation command that was executed (e.g., 'add-id', 'set-state', 'calc', 'archive').

files_modified.description: Number of files that were modified.

entries_affected.description: Number of entries that were affected by the mutation.

dry_run.description: Whether this was a dry-run (no actual changes written).

details.description: Per-entry details of what was changed.

line.description: 1-based line number of the affected entry.

detail.description: Additional detail about the change, or null.

errors.description: Error messages encountered during the operation.
